signals.headline: Cavaliers Defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Take 2-0 Lead in Eastern Conference First-Round Playoffs | NO | HIGH confide
signals.raw:
Cavaliers Defeat Raptors 115-105 in Game 2, Take 2-0 Lead in Eastern Conference First-Round Playoffs | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][4]

The Cleveland Cavaliers won 115-105 against the Toronto Raptors on April 21, 2026, securing a 2-0 series lead in their first-round matchup, with Donovan Mitchell scoring 30 points, James Harden adding 28, and Evan Mobley contributing 25 points and 8 rebounds.[1][4]
